top_signals.title: Intel Rallies to Record After Trump Touts Apple Chip Deal
top_signals.summary: Intel Corp.’s stock surged Thursday after US President Donald Trump said the chipmaker will work with Apple Inc. to design and produce semiconductors domestically.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Thousands of Public-School Staff Across US Face Layoff Warnings
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Erin Hudson joins Scarlet Fu on "Real Yield." Thousands of US public-school employees have received warnings saying they could lose their jobs as the nation’s education system grapples with mounting financial pressures. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
